title: Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful North African stew made with chicken, spices, and dried fruits. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and black pepper.
Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken until browned, then remove from the pot.
Add the tunisian spice blend, cumin, and ginger to the pot. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken broth to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in the crumbled feta cheese (if using).
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
